title: Flight Market Research Manager
required_skills: Excel / SPSS / Tableau or equivalent analytics software
Knowledge of global aviation market and airline industry dynamics
matched_skills: Quantitative and qualitative analysis (cohort analysis, funnel analysis, segmentation)
Analytics software proficiency (Power BI PL-300, Excel, Qlik Sense, Looker Studio)
Analytical thinking and problem-solving (demonstrated across all roles)
C-level data storytelling and stakeholder presentation
Research methodology and KPI framework design (VfB Stuttgart, HSBC)
Dashboard and KPI report development (HSBC multi-dimensional dashboards)
missing_skills: Flight capacity and route network analysis
Airline schedule and fare structure monitoring
SPSS (CV has Power BI / Qlik but not SPSS specifically)
Tableau (CV has Power BI / Qlik but not Tableau specifically)
core_responsibilities: Conduct in-depth research on global flight markets, industry trends, and passenger demographics
Monitor competitor activities across routes — fares, schedules, campaigns
Screen and forecast airline capacity developments across markets
Develop and maintain dashboards and reports tracking route KPIs, flight plan analysis, capacity reports
Provide data-driven recommendations for route development and pricing strategies
recommended_emphasis: Lead with market research credentials — ECE competitive benchmarking and GRG multi-market analysis are most directly transferable
Highlight dashboard and KPI reporting experience (HSBC multi-dimensional budget dashboards, Marketing KPI framework design)
Emphasise competitor monitoring work at IPC (pricing, positioning, channel activity tracking)
Position Power BI PL-300 certification as equivalent to Tableau/SPSS for analytics proficiency
Stress multi-market coverage (EMEA, APAC) to signal capacity to handle global flight market scope
Frame C-level data storytelling as fit for presenting complex aviation data to stakeholders
Acknowledge aviation gap proactively — position as fast learner with strong transferable analytics foundation
